businessGoal: Validate decoupled event-driven microservices architecture for multi-tenant telemetry ingestion
representativeUserPrompt: Audit the AegisOS event bus and architecture boundaries for high-throughput multi-tenant telemetry ingestion and generate an architectural compliance report.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture boundaries verified with zero high-risk coupling violations reported
recoveryBehaviour: Fallback to lightweight structural scanner if deep static graph fails
failureConditions: Unresolved circular dependencies or missing documentation references

businessGoal: Design local-first SQLite to PostgreSQL hybrid synchronization schema with zero data loss guarantees
representativeUserPrompt: Propose a dual-repository persistence architecture supporting SQLite offline mode and PostgreSQL enterprise replication.
acceptanceCriteria: Prisma schema compatibility confirmed across both SQLite and Postgres targets
recoveryBehaviour: Retry schema generator with strict ANSI SQL types
failureConditions: Dialect incompatibility or unindexed foreign keys

businessGoal: Enforce Ponytail minimalism and detect over-engineering in core execution runtime services
representativeUserPrompt: Review src/services/execution-runtime.service.ts for speculative abstractions, unnecessary complexity, and bloat.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify at least 3 simplification candidates with specific line numbers
recoveryBehaviour: Fallback to line-by-line regex pattern scan
failureConditions: Failure to parse TypeScript AST or missing file references

businessGoal: Perform automated security code review to catch hardcoded secrets and injection risks
representativeUserPrompt: Perform a comprehensive security audit of API route handlers in src/app/api/v1.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero false positives on standard NEXT.js route handlers; all endpoints checked for authorization wrappers

businessGoal: Migrate legacy configuration loading to type-safe Zod environment schemas

businessGoal: Upgrade asynchronous file operations to native Promises API across node services
representativeUserPrompt: Refactor legacy callback file utilities in scripts/ to async/await fs/promises.

businessGoal: Identify and deprecate unused utility exports across src/utils
